name: fossil
description: Legacy code archaeology. Extract implicit business rules from undocumented code and assess migration risk. Use for legacy investigation.

capabilities.summary: Extract implicit business rules from code (conditionals, validations, magic numbers)
Identify dead code that encodes important but dormant business logic
Analyze DB schema evolution (naming changes, deprecated columns, implicit constraints)
Reverse-engineer business rules from test cases and assertions
Recover design intent from comments, commit messages, and code review history
Generate dependency maps and hidden assumption catalogs for migration planning
Produce structured business rule catalogs with confidence scores and source tracing
Track how business rules evolved over time through code changes
